channel.title: Watt Pedal Weekly
channel.description: Fresh takes for e-bike commuters and converts.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: ebike battery care
item.description: The persistent myths around ebike battery care, stress-tested against what e-bike commuters and converts actually report.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your commuting in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying commuting project for e-bike commuters — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/bikecommuting is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the conversion community this week.

item.title: The batteries checklist: run this before you spend
item.description: Seven questions that separate a justified batteries purchase from an expensive mood.

item.title: Five mistakes everyone makes in their first month of maintenance
item.description: The most common early stumbles in maintenance, and the cheap corrections that fix them for e-bike commuters and converts.

item.title: "bike to ebike conversion" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about bike to ebike conversion through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.title: Ask the forge: your conversion questions, answered
item.description: Straight answers to the conversion questions e-bike commuters and converts keep asking, minus the hedging.

item.title: The quiet upgrade: small tweaks in batteries with outsized returns
item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest batteries adjustments that e-bike commuters and converts report mattering most.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: bike to ebike conversion
item.description: The persistent myths around bike to ebike conversion, stress-tested against what e-bike commuters and converts actually report.

item.description: One contained, satisfying commuting project for e-bike commuters — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.
